description: Every /consensus run produces output conforming to this schema. Validators return structured data; the synthesizer assembles the final report.

fields.confidence: number — 1 to 10, integer or one decimal
gaps: string — evidence or analysis that's missing

fields.conclusion: string — the conclusion that was validated
fields.domain: string — architecture | code | design | strategy | incident | general

validators.name: string — Deep Verifier | Devil's Advocate | Scope Analyst

fields.consensus_confidence: number — average of validator confidences, 1 decimal
fields.disagreement_flag: boolean — true if any two validators differ by >3 points
confirmed: string — claims all validators agree on
disputed: string — claims with disagreement, including both sides
new_findings: string — discoveries not in original analysis
gaps: string — evidence that would resolve disputes
fields.recommendation: string — action to take based on verdict
